name: character_llm_prompt
description: NEUTRAL-PLAYER system prompt: a no-shot, neutral instruction used by scripts/llm_character.py:CharacterLLMPlayer for MIRROR-H + PHASE-A-ROBUSTNESS. Prompt is uninstructed in the strategic sense (no scaffolding, no archetypes); the only structural ask is that the model emit a REASON: + ANSWER: pair on each call so the per-decision reasoning text can be aggregated into a per-board corpus.
purpose: Used by MIRROR-H (round 1) and PHASE-A-ROBUSTNESS to keep the LLM as a fixed instrument while the board varies.
